summary: Verified all three critical bug fixes for accounting ledger app: P0 (double-counting in Day Start), P1 (customer balances excluding PAY-TOGGLE payments), P2 (Invalid date in Payments tab). All fixes working correctly.

issues: Minor: 404 error for favicon resource - not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: P0 FIX VERIFIED: getRealTimeSummary correctly separates Cash Sales (paymentMode='CASH' orders) from Customer Receipts (payments excluding those linked to CASH orders)
P0 FIX VERIFIED: Backfill migration in index.js correctly classifies orders - CASH orders have NO linked payment receipts except PAY-TOGGLE
P1 FIX VERIFIED: listCustomersWithBalance SQL correctly excludes PAY-TOGGLE payments via 'paymentNumber NOT LIKE PAY-TOGGLE-%' clause
P1 FIX VERIFIED: getCustomerWithTransactions already excludes PAY-TOGGLE in realPayments filter (line 141-144)
P2 FIX VERIFIED: payments/list.jsx uses moment(['DD-MM-YYYY', 'YYYY-MM-DD', 'DD/MM/YYYY']) to parse dates correctly
seed_data_creation: None created - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three bug fixes verified working. P0: Day Start shows Cash Sales=₹4000 (5 CASH orders) and Customer Receipts=₹1000 separately for 16-03-2026. P1: 4 PAY-TOGGLE payments (total ₹2500) exist in DB but are correctly excluded from customer balances. P2: All payment dates display as DD-MM-YYYY with no 'Invalid date' errors.

P1_pay_toggle_exclusion.status: PASS - PAY-TOGGLE payments excluded from customer balances

verification_method.backend: pytest with 10 test cases covering all bug fixes
verification_method.frontend: Playwright browser automation with visual verification
